title: Erianthemum schelei
taxonomy: Erianthemum schelei is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. The Scrophulariaceae family is an ancient and diverse group of flowering plants that were previously divided into multiple families, but have since been reclassified. This family is often referred to as the figwort family, due to its relationship with the figwort genus Scrophularia. As part of the Scrophulariaceae family, Erianthemum schelei is also classified as a member of the order Lamiales. The classification of Erianthemum schelei is further defined at the genus and species levels, providing a detailed understanding of its unique characteristics.
